payload.summary: Eve roadmap: v0.1 Revenue Manager (anomaly detection, pacing, morning digest — IN PROGRESS). v0.2 Owner reports + Tier 1 owner portal. v0.3 Financial ops — Matt's reconciliation assistant (Ramp). v0.4 SEO/LLMO monitoring + CFO weekly digest. v0.5 Internal team chat. v0.6+ Marketing content, owner portal Tier 2.
